name: §6Pigman
description:
§8Combat Pet

§7Defense: §a50

§7Ferocity: §c[Ferocity]

§6Bacon Farmer

§7your island

§6Pork Master

§cDamage §7and §a25 §c❁ Strength§7.

§6Giant Slayer
§7Deal §c+50% §7damage to monsters Level
§a50+§7 and §c+75% §7damage to monsters
§7Level §a100+§7.

§eRight-click to add this pet to your
§epet menu!

variants.name: BBQ Pigman Skin
variants.lore:
§8Consumed on use

§7Pet skins change the look and
§7particle trail of your pet but only
§7one skin can be active at a time!

§7This skin can only be applied to
§aPigman§7 pets.

§eRight-click on your summoned pet to
§eapply this skin!
